description: Golden regression dataset for the Aspen Dental FedEx shipping bot parser. Each entry contains the raw ServiceNow ticket text and the EXACT expected parse output. The Cowork regression test should run parseTicket(raw) and assert the result matches expected for every ticket. This pins correct behavior independent of any single code version, so a refactor cannot silently change parsing.

field_notes.callerName: The recipient — who the FedEx label is addressed to.
field_notes._onBehalfOf: Set when the recipient differs from the requester (care-of address name, or New Hire submitter). null otherwise.
field_notes._isNewHire: true for New Hire / Transfer tickets.
field_notes._submitter: The HR/admin who filed a New Hire ticket (not the recipient).
field_notes._addressNameRecipient: Set when a name on the Address block became the recipient.
field_notes._addressPartial: true when only a partial address (e.g. street only) could be parsed.
field_notes.shippingGate: 'open' = Yes, 'blocked' = 'Is this being shipped: No', 'none' = no gate field present (typical INC).
field_notes.items: Array of {type, qty}. Empty array = no shippable hardware (e.g. software request).
field_notes.configurationItem: Combined CI / asset identifiers, '/'-joined when multiple.

covers: two-line Teams paste: bare name line -> callerName; lowercase street kept as typed ('3501 jamboree rd'); 'suite 4000' -> line2; comma-separated city/state/zip; no company signal -> TAG default; no phone -> DEFAULT_PHONE; no items

tickets.label: Gabrielle Aragon Flanagan — return-request email: 3-part name fused to the street on one line
covers: free-text return request: 'ship a box out ... to return her laptop' -> laptop x1; recipient name sits on the SAME line as the street with no separator ('Gabrielle Aragon Flanagan 1220 Stonegate Dr Marengo, IL 60152') -> name = callerName + _addressNameRecipient, street/city split on suffix 'Dr'; no phone -> DEFAULT_PHONE; no company signal -> TAG default; gate none
tickets.raw:
Please ship a box out to this former fellow to return her laptop.
 
Gabrielle Aragon Flanagan 1220 Stonegate Dr Marengo, IL 60152

4534 N Greenview 60640 Chicago IL

tickets.label: daniel yonan — lowercase jumbled one-liner, name BETWEEN zip and city

tickets.label: Ray Lane — conversational return email, comma-led name before a canonical address; sign-off name must not win
covers: Strategy A name-lookback: 'Ray Lane, 41506 N Hudson Trail, Anthem, AZ 85086' inside a sentence -> name adjacent to street number -> careOf; 'Thanks Dan.' ignored; no device named -> items []
tickets.raw: Cool.  Ray Lane, 41506 N Hudson Trail, Anthem, AZ 85086.  IF you provide a return label, after I ensure all is moved I'll ship the old back to you.  Thanks Dan.
